brand.name: Cardinal Medical
brand.value_prop: Cardinal Medical is a regional academic medical centre. Cardiac, oncology, neurology, and orthopaedics. Find a doctor, schedule an appointment, access patient portal.
brand.target_audience: patients seeking specialty care and referrals

spec.notes:
WHAT WE'RE BUILDING (healthcare_clinic): A healthcare provider site — could be a clinic, hospital system, or telehealth service. The aesthetic is calming (soft blue / teal palette), professional, photography-led but with natural / human imagery (not stock-doctor). The primary jobs are: explain what services we offer, find a doctor, book an appointment, log into the patient portal. Tone is reassuring, plain-language. AVOID: aggressive marketing, high-saturation accents, busy layouts. BRAND: Cardinal Medical — "Specialised care, evidence-based" Cardinal Medical is a regional academic medical centre. Cardiac, oncology, neurology, and orthopaedics. Find a doctor, schedule an appointment, access patient portal. VISUAL LANGUAGE (glassy_pastel): Backgrounds are soft gradient fields (palette anchor at 8-12% saturation, blending to a light neutral). Content lives in centered cards (~420px wide for forms) with a frosted-glass effect: subtle backdrop-filter blur, semi-transparent white background (rgba(255,255,255,0.7)), 1px translucent border. Buttons primary-filled with the palette anchor. Avoid: heavy shadows, busy backgrounds, opaque white cards (defeats glassy). DESIGN REFERENCES (style + topic): clevelandclinic.org, mayoclinic.org, onemedical.com, clerk.dev, vercel.com/login, supabase.com/dashboard/sign-in PER-PAGE GUIDANCE: - index: Calming hero — natural human image + headline like 'Better care, closer to home' + primary CTA ('Book an appointment'). Below: services-grid (3-4 categories), 'find a doctor' block, recent-news / patient-stories section, locations strip. - about: Mission paragraph, leadership / quality stats (awards, accreditations), patient-experience pillars. - locations: Map/list of locations. Each entry: address, phone, hours, services available, accepting-new-patients flag. - appointment: Appointment-request form: provider, type, preferred date/time, contact info, notes. - find-a-doctor: Search filters (specialty, location, language, accepting-new-patients) + grid of doctor cards (photo, name, specialty, link). - patient-portal: Login-card pattern (similar to auth_flow): email + password + login + 'don't have an account?' link. Brand reassurance copy. - services: List of services / specialties — cards by category (cardiology, pediatrics, etc.) with brief description and 'learn more' link. IMAGE POLICY (HARD CONSTRAINT): - For purely decorative content (hero illustrations, abstract section dividers, decorative blobs): use NO `` tags. Use CSS gradients, inline SVG, or styled `
` blocks with `background-color` / `aspect-ratio` instead. - For content-essential photography (product photos, dish photos, hotel rooms, portrait avatars, editorial leads), use `` where X is EXCLUSIVELY one of these five filenames: photo-product-1.jpg (generic product / object — warm tones) photo-product-2.jpg (cooler product variant — for grids) photo-portrait-1.jpg (generic person — for avatars / team / bylines) photo-landscape-1.jpg (generic scene — for hero / hospitality leads) illustration-abstract.jpg (mesh-gradient — for splash / decorative hero) - Repeating a filename across multiple `` tags is fine. - ANY OTHER `src=` value will be rejected at validation time. No external URLs, no other filenames, no svg files.
